heading: Mental incompetency of member
label: 1449 Mental incompetency of member
notes: Amendments2016—Subsec. (b)(2). inserted “or CRSC” after “retired pay” in heading and “or combat-related special compensation” after “from retired pay” in text.Pub. L. 114–3281996— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “If a person to whom applies is determined to be mentally incompetent by medical officers of the armed force concerned or of the Department of Veterans Affairs, or by a court of competent jurisdiction, any election described in subsection (a)(2) or (b) of may be made on behalf of that person by the Secretary concerned. If the person for whom the Secretary has made an election is later determined to be mentally competent by an authority named in the first sentence, he may, within 180 days after that determination revoke that election. Any deductions made from retired pay by reason of such an election will not be refunded.”Pub. L. 104–201section 1448 of this titlesection 1448 of this title1989— substituted “Department of Veterans Affairs” for “Veterans’ Administration” and struck out “or retainer” after “made from retired”.Pub. L. 101–1891978— substituted “subsection (a)(2) or (b)” for “the first sentence of subsection (a), or subsection (b)”.Pub. L. 95–397

Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by effective , and applicable to annuities payable by virtue of amendment for months beginning on or after such date, see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–397section 210 of Pub. L. 95–397section 1447 of this titleOct. 1, 1978

children.heading: .—Election by Secretary Concerned on Behalf of Mentally Incompetent Member
children.label: a .—Election by Secretary Concerned on Behalf of Mentally Incompetent Member
children.text: If a person to whom applies is determined to be mentally incompetent by medical officers of the armed force concerned or of the Department of Veterans Affairs, or by a court of competent jurisdiction, an election described in subsection (a)(2) or (b) of may be made on behalf of that person by the Secretary concerned.section 1448 of this titlesection 1448 of this title

children.heading: Revocation of Election by Member.—
children.label: b Revocation of Election by Member.—

children.heading: .—Authority upon subsequent determination of mental competence
children.label: 1 .—Authority upon subsequent determination of mental competence
children.text: If a person for whom the Secretary has made an election under subsection (a) is later determined to be mentally competent by an authority named in that subsection, that person may, within 180 days after that determination, revoke that election.

children.heading: .—Deductions from retired pay or CRSC not to be refunded
children.label: 2 .—Deductions from retired pay or CRSC not to be refunded
children.text: Any deduction made from retired pay or combat-related special compensation by reason of such an election may not be refunded.
